title: Hypixel Skyblock - Vulkan
description: a Hypixel Skyblock Modpack Based On Vulkan
body:
# Hypixel Skyblock - Vulkan

A lightweight **performance-focused modpack** specially built for **Hypixel Skyblock**, powered by the **Vulkan rendering engine** for dramatically better FPS and smoother gameplay!

---

![Skyblock Hub](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dcecb5d16777e7daf194c842f4a0850b6e25ffaa.jpeg)

### What does this modpack add?
This modpack replaces Minecraft's default OpenGL renderer with **VulkanMod**, a modern graphics API that rewrites rendering from the ground up. Combined with essential Skyblock utility mods, it delivers:
- Much higher and more stable FPS — especially during intense moments like boss fights (e.g., Kuudra, Dungeons, Blazing Fortress), large Jerry islands, or crowded hubs
- Better compatibility and performance with popular Hypixel Skyblock mods such as **SkyHanni**, **Skyblocker**, **NotEnoughUpdates (NEU)** / **NoFrills**, **Skytils** (or similar), and others
- Lightweight overall — no heavy shaders, no unnecessary content mods, just pure optimization for Skyblock players
- All the core quality-of-life features Skyblock players need without sacrificing speed

### Key Features
- **Vulkan Rendering** — Significantly faster than vanilla OpenGL, with lower input lag and better GPU utilization (great for mid/low-end PCs or laptops)
- **Hypixel Skyblock compatibility** — Tested to work smoothly on Hypixel servers with major Skyblock mods
- **FPS boost in demanding situations** — Say goodbye to lag spikes during zealot hunting, mining large veins, or end-game grinding
- **Minimal & clean** — Only performance + essential Skyblock utilities, no bloat

### Why download this modpack?
If you're playing **Hypixel Skyblock** and suffering from:
- Low FPS in crowded areas or during big fights
- Stutters/frame drops when using feature-rich mods like SkyHanni
- Heat/lag on laptops while grinding for hours

...then this pack is for you. It keeps your game fast and responsive so you can focus on farming minions, flipping items, dungeon carries, or maxing skills — not staring at 20 FPS slideshows.

Perfect for players who want **maximum performance** on Hypixel without switching to completely vanilla or shader-heavy packs.

**Important notes:**
- Requires a GPU that supports **Vulkan 1.2+** (most modern GPUs do — check VulkanMod page if unsure)
- Install via Modrinth App or your preferred launcher
- Always use the latest versions of included mods for best Hypixel compatibility

Enjoy smoother Skyblock — get blazing fast FPS today!
